title: Atlas snapshot inline coherence summary v0
problem: Ticket-300 product verdict: coherence verdict lives in a separate JSON file; /atlas-preview imports two files. Optional coherence_summary on snapshot enables single-import pages.
acceptance_criteria: Pre-ticket audit written before implementation (medium risk: public preview JSON).
Fixture-mode atlas snapshot includes coherence_summary block (verdict + preview_label only).
/atlas-preview can read coherence from snapshot when present (keep separate file fallback).
Golden + full pytest + safety audit + public-site build pass.
non_goals: Full coherence report body in snapshot.
rollback_plan: Revert coherence_summary projection and preview JSON only.
